title: Brazilian Snap Pea Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry inspired by Brazilian cuisine, featuring snap peas and a hint of tropical sweetness.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the snap peas and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until tender but still crisp.
Add the diced tropical fruit and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Sprinkle the sugar over the top and stir to combine.
Cook for a final 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving dish and garnish with chopped cilantro.
